subject: Build binary and install to ~/.local/bin
description:
Add gemini-slave to the build process:

1. Update Makefile (or create if not exists):
```makefile
.PHONY: gemini-slave
gemini-slave:
    go build -o ~/.local/bin/gemini-slave ./cmd/gemini-slave

.PHONY: test-gemini-slave
test-gemini-slave:
    go test -v ./cmd/gemini-slave/...
    ./scripts/test_gemini_slave_e2e.sh ~/.local/bin/gemini-slave
```

2. Build and verify:
```bash
go build -o ~/.local/bin/gemini-slave ./cmd/gemini-slave
~/.local/bin/gemini-slave --help
```

3. Backup bash version:
```bash
mv ~/.local/bin/gemini-slave ~/.local/bin/gemini-slave.bash.bak
```

4. Verify the new binary handles the original failing case:
```bash
find cmd/gogent-scout -name "*.go" -exec cat {} \; | gemini-slave mapper "Map entry points" -o json
```
